label_notes: Source: training knowledge (WebFetch blocked 2026-03-20). Based on Epic Games Privacy Policy through mid-2025. Notable: Fortnite has large teen/child user base; Epic COPPA compliant but targeted ads still concern for minors. Extensive cross-game data collection via Epic Games Launcher. Voice and video chat data collection significant privacy consideration.
